patch.note: Removed wasp stinger part to eliminate persistent hazard after death; slightly reduced wasp body HP to compensate for lost weak point.
Increased Grub and Wasp contact damage to 2 to make flat-plane encounters more threatening; slightly increased Turret lob speed and Wasp shoot speed to reduce trivial dodging on horizontal corridors.

Increased Iron Moth seeker speed and turn rate to make homing missiles more threatening; increased Mech Moth missile speed and turn rate for the same reason; slightly increased Wasp movement speed and bob amplitude to make flying enemies harder to hit.
Reduced Iron Moth seeker missile turn rate and speed to make homing projectiles more dodgeable during the boss fight, addressing combat fatigue from dense projectile patterns.
Reduced Iron Moth seeker missile speed and turn rate to make the boss finale more readable and fair, addressing the player's death near the exit and request for a dramatic but beatable ending.

Reduced Wasp patrol speed and bob amplitude to make them easier to hit on ladder climbs; lowered Iron Moth seeker turn rate and speed to reduce homing pressure in vertical shafts; decreased Missile Patroller missile turn rate and speed for fairer dodging on ladders.

Reduced Wasp projectile speed and Iron Moth seeker turn rate to ease projectile density in long horizontal corridors; lowered Missile Patroller missile turn rate and homing speed for fairer dodging on flat terrain.
Reduced Iron Moth seeker turn rate and missile patroller homing missile turn rate to make projectiles more dodgeable; slightly increased wasp bob amplitude for better visual readability.
